name: Gambling
description: Betting, casino, lottery, fantasy sports. Campaigns promoting wagering products or gambling platforms.

regulatory_frameworks.name: UK Gambling Act 2005
regulatory_frameworks.summary: Gambling Commission regulates advertising. Must not target minors, must include responsible gambling messaging, must comply with self-exclusion requirements.

regulatory_frameworks.name: US State-Level Gambling Laws
regulatory_frameworks.summary: Legality varies by state. Geo-restriction to legal jurisdictions required. Self-exclusion list compliance where available.

guidance: Similar to alcohol — age-gating and geo-restriction are primary concerns. Self-exclusion list compliance is a significant governance requirement where available. Some jurisdictions prohibit gambling advertising entirely.
